clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the processing of emotional states, physiological arousal, and autonomic regulation, which are heavily anchored in the co-activation patterns of the brain's salience and limbic systems.
This domain captures the continuous assessment of incentives, outcomes, and subjective worth used to guide purposeful decision-making, systematically mapping onto frontostriatal reward circuits.

This domain reflects the higher-order representation of agents, seamlessly binding self-referential thought, autobiographical memory, and the understanding of others through the coordinated activity of the default mode network.
